creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is a regression on the latest cluster update that breaks lang/perl5.24.  Of course this results in a useless build (19915 ports blocked).

There was no content-related update to the perl5.24 Makefile during this time.

Last good build:

http://beefy8.nyi.freebsd.org/data/head-armv6-default/p441125_s318432/logs/perl5-5.24.1_1.log

First bad build:

http://beefy8.nyi.freebsd.org/data/head-armv6-default/p442268_s1200031/logs/errors/perl5-5.24.1_1.log

< building for: FreeBSD head-armv6-default-job-02 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT r318432 arm
> building for: FreeBSD head-armv6-default-job-03 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT 1200031 arm
